sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29052" key="dusqali/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσ-θᾰλία</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ας</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n29052.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a misfortune</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0524.tlg001:83" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sophr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">83</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
